title: Bridge Essay: Visual imagery influences brain responses to visual stimulation in bilateral cor

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal Reconstruction** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Imaginal — mental imagery as real perception, imagination activating sensory cortices, aphantasia.

**Visual imagery influences brain responses to visual stimulation in bilateral cortical blindness.**. Cortex.. PMID: 25571770. DOI: 10.1016/j.cortex.2014.11.009. Mental imagery is apowerful mechanism that may facilitate visual perception as well as compensate for it. The role of V1 in mental imagery is still amatter of debate. Our goal here was to investigate whether visual imagery was still possible in case of bilateral V1 destruction behaviorally evidenced by total clinical blindness and if so, whether it might boost residual visual perception.
